purpose: Sample Works tender configuration used to test STD-WORKS-POC package loading, rule validation, scenario activation, required-form generation, BoQ handling, and tender-pack preview rendering.

configuration.TENDER.PROCURING_ENTITY_ADDRESS: County Headquarters, Procurement Department, P.O. Box 100-00100, Kisiwa, Kenya
configuration.TENDER.CONTRACT_DESCRIPTION: Construction of a ward administration block including substructure, superstructure, roofing, finishes, associated external works, drainage, paving, and service connections.
configuration.DATES.SITE_VISIT_LOCATION: Proposed Ward Administration Block Site, Mwangaza Ward
configuration.DATES.PRE_TENDER_MEETING_LOCATION: County Government of Kisiwa Boardroom, Procurement Department
configuration.ALTERNATIVES.ALTERNATIVE_SCOPE_DESCRIPTI: Alternative technical solutions are permitted only for the roof structure, provided the tenderer first prices the procuring entity's base design and provides sufficient technical details for comparison.
configuration.WORKS.SCOPE_SUMMARY: The works comprise construction of a ward administration block, associated external works, drainage, paving, and service connections in Mwangaza Ward.
configuration.WORKS.SPECIFICATION_SUMMARY: Works shall be executed in accordance with approved drawings, specifications, applicable building standards, quality requirements, and instructions issued under the contract.
configuration.WORKS.ESHS_REQUIREMENTS: The contractor shall comply with applicable environmental, social, health and safety requirements, including site safety controls, waste management, worker welfare, and public safety around the construction site.
configuration.CONTRACT.ENGINEER_OR_PROJECT_MANAGER: County Director of Public Works or appointed representative
configuration.CONTRACT.LIQUIDATED_DAMAGES_RATE: 0.05 percent of contract price per day of delay, subject to the maximum stated in the SCC
configuration.CONTRACT.PAYMENT_TERMS: Interim payments shall be made against certified works executed, subject to contract conditions, retention, taxes, and approved payment certificates.
configuration.CONTRACT.INSURANCE_REQUIREMENTS: Contractor shall maintain insurance for works, contractor's equipment, third-party liability, workers, and other risks required under the contract.

lots.description: Construction of ward administration block substructure, superstructure, roofing, finishes, and associated building works.
Drainage, paving, boundary works, water connection, external electrical service works, and associated site works.

rows.description: Preliminary and general items including mobilization, insurances, site establishment, and temporary works.
Excavation, foundation works, hardcore filling, blinding, and ground slab works.
Walling, columns, beams, suspended slabs, and related structural works.
Roof structure, covering, rainwater goods, and associated roof works.
Internal and external finishes including plaster, screed, paint, doors, windows, fittings, and fixtures.
Drainage, paving, site clearance, landscaping, boundary works, and service connections.
Daywork allowance for labour, materials, and contractor's equipment as instructed under the contract.
Provisional sum for utility service adjustments and statutory service provider requirements.
Grand summary of priced BoQ sections and provisional sums.

notes: The primary sample should validate successfully after package import and before deliberate negative test variants are applied.
The primary sample contains representative BoQ rows, so BoQ, dayworks, and provisional sums child-row rules should pass.

scenario_variants.description: Switches the tender scope to international to test foreign tenderer local input activation.
Uses tender-securing declaration instead of tender security to test security form switching.
Enables reservation and provides reserved group to test reserved tender rendering.
Removes site visit date and location to test blocker validation.
Removes alternative tender scope to test blocker validation.
Disables multiple lots and uses a single default lot scenario.
Enables retention money security to test contract security form activation.

notes: This sample tender is fictional and is for POC testing only.
The sample does not represent an approved procurement plan, real budget, or real public tender.
BoQ rows are representative and intentionally simplified.
The primary sample is expected to pass validation after the template engine and child-row validation are implemented.
Scenario variants are override patches to support targeted tests without duplicating the full sample configuration.
